items.title: Will Riley draws Darrin Peterson's eighth foul on a bucket-and-one, and then Peterson picks up his NINTH seconds later! Wizards clinging to a four-point lead with 45 seconds left.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt: Will Riley draws Darrin Peterson's eighth foul on a bucket-and-one, and then Peterson picks up his NINTH seconds later! Wizards clinging to a four-point lead with 45 seconds left.

media.title: Gearing up for Wizards' 2026 Summer League with Will Riley | Off The Bench
media.description: YouTube video by Monumental Sports Network

items.title: When the Wizards open their summer-league schedule Thursday, several players will receive reps handling the basketball as a developmental opportunity: (in alphabetical order) AJ Dybantsa, Tre Johnson and Will Riley.
items.author: Josh Robbins
items.body_excerpt: When the Wizards open their summer-league schedule Thursday, several players will receive reps handling the basketball as a developmental opportunity: (in alphabetical order) AJ Dybantsa, Tre Johnson and Will Riley.
